tags.name: Node
tags.description: Information about the nodes in the network

tags.name: Organization
tags.description: Information about the organizations in the network

tags.name: ArchiveScans
tags.description: Public history archive scan views and queue health

tags.name: CommunityScanners
tags.description: Community archive scanner registration, heartbeat, and aggregate metrics

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Public service, worker, queue, and data-freshness status

tags.name: CrossCheck
tags.description: External source catalog and cross-reference review endpoints

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Faceted search over rebuildable StellarAtlas read models

tags.name: FBAS
tags.description: Federated Byzantine Agreement System aggregate quorum evidence

tags.name: Explorer
tags.description: Explorer lookup endpoints backed by configured Horizon or future full-history stores

get.description: Get current network information, statistics, nodes, organizations, SCP analysis fields, and organization horizonUrl values when reported.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Fetch at specific point in time

get.description: Server-sent event stream that emits current network snapshots as network events for live dashboards.
Faceted search for current validators, nodes, organizations, and archive-related network metadata.
Fixed node-only alias for the current network search endpoint. Uses the same bounded filters and facet response as /v1/search with type=node.
Fixed organization-only alias for the current network search endpoint. Uses the same bounded facet response as /v1/search with type=organization.
Returns the latest ledger from the configured Horizon source for frontend graph and explorer views.

get.summary: Get transactions for a ledger slot
get.description: Returns a bounded transaction list for a ledger sequence from configured Horizon.
Reports StellarAtlas-owned parsed ledger-header coverage and explicitly marks transaction, asset, operation, and contract indexes as not ready until local full-history ETL is complete.
Searches transaction hashes, account IDs, ledger sequences, asset queries, and contract IDs using the currently configured Horizon/RPC helper paths.
Returns a bounded recent transaction feed from configured Horizon.
Explorer namespace alias for Horizon-backed transaction lookup.

404.description: Transaction not found

get.description: Returns bounded Horizon operation rows for one transaction hash.

404.description: Transaction not found

get.description: Returns ledger facts from configured Horizon.

404.description: Ledger not found

get.description: Returns account state from configured Horizon.

404.description: Account not found

get.description: Returns a bounded Horizon asset search result by optional code and issuer.
Returns bounded Horizon operation rows filtered by ledger, account, operation type, or date range.
Reports RPC-backed contract lookup readiness for a contract ID.
Returns persisted full-history parser readiness from archive-derived parsed ledger headers.
Returns parser status with archive indexing job queue summary.
Returns bounded recent archive indexing jobs from the persisted scanner queue.
Returns per-archive parsed ledger header coverage from persisted parser evidence.
Reports whether an archive-derived parsed ledger header is available for a ledger sequence.

get.summary: Look up a transaction by hash
get.description: Returns lean public transaction facts from the configured Horizon source. This is a lookup boundary, not the full-history graph API.

404.description: Transaction not found in configured Horizon

get.description: Get the latest updated node snapshots in the network

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Latest snapshots at specific point in time

get.description: Get the latest updated organization snapshots in the network

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Latest snapshots at specific point in time

get.description: Returns all the crawled nodes with statistics and geo data

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Fetch at specific point in time

get.summary: Get a node by public key
get.description: Returns the requested node with statistics and geo data

parameters.name: publicKey
parameters.description: Public Key of the node to return

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Fetch at specific point in time

404.description: Node not found

get.summary: Get the latest snapshots of a node
get.description: Get the latest snapshots of a node

parameters.name: publicKey
parameters.description: Public Key of the node to return

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Latest snapshots at specific point in time

get.description: Returns all crawled organizations, including horizonUrl when reported by Stellar TOML metadata.
Returns aggregate FBAS quorum metrics from the latest completed network scan measurement. The endpoint does not run live analysis and does not include persisted proof sets.

404.description: No latest completed network scan was found

get.summary: Get latest persisted FBAS blocking sets
get.description: Returns persisted blocking-set proof families from the latest completed network scan proof artifact. The endpoint does not run live analysis or recompute FBAS data. Families can be capped; inspect complete flags and capture limits before treating a response as exhaustive.

404.description: No latest persisted FBAS blocking-set evidence was found

get.summary: Get latest persisted FBAS splitting sets
get.description: Returns persisted splitting-set proof families from the latest completed network scan proof artifact. The endpoint does not run live analysis or recompute FBAS data. Families can be capped; inspect complete flags and capture limits before treating a response as exhaustive.

404.description: No latest persisted FBAS splitting-set evidence was found

get.summary: Get FBAS aggregate evidence for a scan
get.description: Returns aggregate FBAS quorum metrics from a completed network scan measurement. The endpoint does not run live analysis, recompute FBAS data, or include persisted proof sets.

200.description: aggregate FBAS evidence for the completed scan

404.description: No completed FBAS analysis was found for the scan id

get.summary: Get persisted FBAS proof evidence for a scan
get.description: Returns the persisted scan-time FBAS proof artifact for a completed network scan. The endpoint does not run live analysis or recompute historical proof sets. Proof families can be capped; inspect complete flags and capture limits before treating a response as exhaustive.

200.description: persisted FBAS proof evidence for the completed scan

404.description: No persisted FBAS proof was found for the scan id

get.description: Returns persisted daily aggregate top-tier FBAS rollups for a bounded UTC-day window. The endpoint does not run live analysis, recompute FBAS data, or include persisted proof sets.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end day. The date window must not exceed 90 days.

get.description: Returns a read-only aggregate of API health, persisted data freshness, archive queue health, and worker health.
Returns the API process status from the responding origin.
Returns configured frontend target readiness from local configuration. It does not probe the frontend.
Returns local Horizon readiness from configuration, including external fallback state. It does not probe Horizon.
Returns local Stellar RPC readiness from configuration. It does not probe RPC.
Returns configured failover frontend/API targets from local configuration. It does not probe failover targets.
Returns latest persisted network scan and archive scan timestamps with age and freshness status. It does not run live scans.
Returns a read-only aggregate of persisted data freshness, raw scan continuity, daily rollup continuity, and archive queue health.
Returns persisted raw network scan counts and completion percentages for a bounded recent window. It does not run live scans.
Returns bounded chronological network scan and archive scan run logs. Archive worker/setup issues and archive verification errors remain separate evidence classes.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows per scan class. Defaults to 12 and is capped by the server.

get.description: Returns persisted raw-completed-scan counts compared with daily network rollup crawl counts for the last complete UTC days. It does not run rollup jobs.
Returns queue health derived from persisted archive scan jobs.
Returns archive worker and community scanner aggregate status without exposing worker secrets or contact emails.
Returns the internal and external sources StellarAtlas uses for non-adversarial parity and cross-reference review. This endpoint does not probe external systems.

Returns recent persisted RADAR versus StellarAtlas API documentation comparison snapshot summaries. This endpoint does not fetch RADAR, run live probes, recompute comparisons, or include operation-level diff payloads.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of snapshot summaries to return.

200.description: recent API docs comparison snapshot summaries

get.summary: Get latest API documentation cross-check snapshot
get.description: Returns the latest persisted RADAR versus StellarAtlas API documentation comparison snapshot. This endpoint does not fetch RADAR or run live probes.

200.description: latest persisted API docs comparison snapshot

204.description: No API docs comparison snapshot has been stored

get.description: Returns recent persisted RADAR versus StellarAtlas network comparison snapshot summaries. This endpoint does not fetch RADAR, run live probes, recompute comparisons, run network scans, or include validator/organization diff payloads.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of snapshot summaries to return.

200.description: recent RADAR network comparison snapshot summaries

get.summary: Get latest RADAR network cross-check snapshot
get.description: Returns the latest persisted RADAR versus StellarAtlas network comparison snapshot. This endpoint does not fetch RADAR, run live probes, recompute comparisons, or run network scans.

200.description: latest persisted RADAR network comparison snapshot

204.description: No RADAR network comparison snapshot has been stored

get.description: Returns persisted StellarAtlas organization evidence from the latest network snapshot for external cross-reference review. External RADAR comparison is explicitly not probed by this endpoint.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of organization rows to return.

get.description: Returns persisted StellarAtlas validator evidence from the latest network snapshot for external cross-reference review. External RADAR comparison is explicitly not probed by this endpoint.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of validator rows to return.

get.description: Returns persisted StellarAtlas archive verification evidence prepared for external cross-reference review. External RADAR comparison is explicitly not probed by this endpoint.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of archive rows to return.

get.description: Returns the requested organization, including horizonUrl when reported by Stellar TOML metadata.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Fetch at specific point in time

404.description: Organization not found

get.summary: Get the latest snapshots of an organization
get.description: Get the latest snapshots of an organization

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Latest snapshots at specific point in time

get.summary: Get the latest history scan by url
get.description: Returns the latest history scan by url

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: url of the history archive (url encoded)

get.description: Returns a bounded list of the latest public history archive scan state per archive URL.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of archive scan rows to return.

get.description: Returns a read-only queue snapshot for unfinished history archive scan jobs.
Returns a read-only worker-slot snapshot derived from currently taken archive scan jobs.

Returns a bounded scanner-owned archive object queue snapshot. Object rows represent concrete history archive files such as root history archive state, checkpoint state, ledger, transaction, result, and bucket files.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of object rows to return.

get.description: Returns scanner-owned archive object coverage grouped by object type, checkpoint, and bucket state across all known history archive URLs.

get.summary: List recent history archive object events
get.description: Returns a bounded scanner-owned event log for archive object claims, heartbeats, completions, failures, and releases.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of event rows to return.

get.summary: List history archive objects by archive URL
get.description: Returns a bounded scanner-owned archive object queue snapshot for one history archive URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of object rows to return.

get.summary: Summarize history archive object coverage by archive URL
get.description: Returns scanner-owned archive object coverage grouped by object type, checkpoint, and bucket state for one history archive URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

get.summary: List recent history archive object events by archive URL
get.description: Returns a bounded scanner-owned event log for one history archive URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of event rows to return.

get.description: Returns recent completed scan entries and active queue entries for a history archive URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

get.summary: Get history archive state by URL
get.description: Returns the latest scanner-owned history archive state record for a history archive URL. Available records contain the parsed .well-known/stellar-history.json body. Invalid and unreachable records contain the persisted scanner failure evidence for that archive URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

204.description: No scanner-owned history archive state record exists for this URL yet

get.description: Returns verified bucket evidence persisted by history scanner runs for a history archive URL. Evidence rows are successful bucket-hash verification records and are separate from archive error logs and worker/setup failures.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of evidence rows to return.

get.summary: Get the latest archive scan by URL
get.description: Returns the latest history archive scan for a URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

post.description: Creates a community scanner identity and returns a one-time API key. Contact email and the stored API key hash are never returned by this public response.

apiKey.description: One-time API key. It is hashed before persistence and cannot be read again.

429.description: Too many scanner registration attempts from this source

post.description: Authenticates a community scanner with its one-time API key and updates its heartbeat timestamp.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted or temporarily blocked

404.description: Scanner not found

get.summary: Claim the next community scanner job
get.description: Authenticates a community scanner, refreshes its heartbeat, enforces scanner claim admission controls, atomically marks one pending history archive scan job as taken, and attributes the claim to that scanner.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted or temporarily blocked

404.description: Scanner not found

post.summary: Refresh a community scanner job heartbeat
post.description: Authenticates a community scanner, refreshes its scanner heartbeat, and updates a taken scan job only when that scanner owns the claim.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed scan job

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

400.description: Invalid scanner id or scan job id

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted or temporarily blocked

404.description: Scanner not found or scan job is not owned and active

post.description: Authenticates a community scanner, validates that the scan job is active and owned by that scanner, stores the scan result with attribution, marks the job done, and updates scanner completion metrics.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

400.description: Invalid scanner id or scan body

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted, temporarily blocked, or job is owned by another scanner

404.description: Scanner or scan job not found

get.description: Returns aggregate community scanner metrics. Active/offline counts are derived from heartbeat freshness and scanner blocking state, and no contact email or API key material is returned.

permanentlyBlacklistedScanners.description: Scanners blocked by the permanent blacklist flag.

temporarilyBlockedScanners.description: Scanners with is_blacklisted=false and a future blacklisted_until expiry.

claimDeniedByBlockedScanners.description: Scanners whose first claim-denial reason is blocked status.

claimDeniedByActiveJobLimitScanners.description: Scanners whose first claim-denial reason is the active job cap.

claimDeniedByProductionScoreScanners.description: Scanners whose first claim-denial reason is production success score.

claimIneligibleScanners.description: Scanners currently denied by any claim policy reason.

probationaryScanners.description: Scanners below the completed-job threshold for production scoring.

claimEligibleScanners.description: Scanners currently passing claim-admission policy; queue availability is reported separately.

claimPolicyMaxActiveJobsPerScanner.description: Active taken-job cap used by community scanner claim admission.

claimPolicyMinJobsForProductionScore.description: Completed plus failed job threshold before production score is enforced.

claimPolicyMinSuccessRate.description: Minimum success rate required after the probation window.

staleScanJobAgeMs.description: Taken jobs older than this window are ignored for active-job denial counts.

post.description: Internal authenticated operator endpoint. Fetches a bounded set of missing root stellar-history.json files and stores validated history archive state metadata on existing selected archive scan rows. It does not create successful scan rows or fetch data from frontend page renders.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of archive URLs to backfill in this request.

get.summary: Claim the next pending history scan job
get.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Atomically marks one pending history archive scan job as taken and returns it to a scanner.

get.summary: Claim the next pending history archive object
get.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Atomically marks one pending history archive object as scanning and returns it to an object verifier worker.

post.summary: Refresh a claimed history archive object
post.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Updates object verifier heartbeat/progress for the current claim attempt.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed archive object

400.description: Invalid remote id or request body

404.description: Archive object job is not currently claimed

post.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Marks a claimed history archive object verified for the current claim attempt.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed archive object

400.description: Invalid remote id or request body

404.description: Archive object job is not currently claimed

post.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Marks a claimed history archive object failed for the current claim attempt and stores sanitized failure evidence.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed archive object

400.description: Invalid remote id or request body

404.description: Archive object job is not currently claimed

post.summary: Release a claimed history archive object
post.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Releases the current archive object claim attempt back to pending without marking the archive object verified or failed.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed archive object

400.description: Invalid remote id or request body

404.description: Archive object job is not currently claimed

post.summary: Refresh a taken history scan job
post.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Updates the heartbeat timestamp for a taken scan job so long-running archive scans are not treated as stale.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed scan job

404.description: Scan job is not currently taken

get.description: Returns network measurements for the requested time window.

post.description: Requests an unsubscribe link for a subscriber reference.
Removes notification muting for a subscriber reference.

delete.description: Deletes a notification subscription for a subscriber reference.

payloadBytes.description: Serialized byte size of the full persisted FBAS proof artifact.
Serialized byte size of the full persisted FBAS proof artifact, not just this filtered response.

complete.description: True when every returned proof family is exhaustive under the recorded limits.
True only when every captured proof family is exhaustive under the recorded limits.
